meaning: n.闪族人[语]adj.闪族的,闪族语系的
examples: He formerly led Breitbart News, a website that has printed white nationalist and anti-Semitic vitriol.
Malta has two official languages in Maltese (a Semitic language) and English.
Twitter has agreed to remove a flood of anti-Semitic tweets circulating on its service in France.
Incidents of anti-Semitic violence in Europe reached post-Holocaust record highs over the past month.
